scene_title: Robo em postura oratoria com ondas sonoras
narrative_beat: Luz carmesim da garganta mecanica em anfiteatro romano

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid humanoid robot in speech pose with open mouth raised arm in oratory gesture crimson light from mechanical throat and golden medieval ornament sound waves emanating from mouth in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the crimson light from the mechanical throat and golden sound waves
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated Roman amphitheater ruins with empty grey stone seating in background

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, crimson saturation, anamorphic flare

mood.emotion: the image speaks in the house once used to condemn Christians

symbolism.primary: the speaking machine in the place of ancient persecution
symbolism.secondary: sound waves as medieval ornament — ancient language for future technology

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
